summary: UAT Iteration 511 - Full User Acceptance Test of Visionary Suite. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows verified. Dashboard, Battle Page, Explore, Pricing, Profile, About pages all working correctly. Paywall modal shows 3 packs (₹29/₹49/₹149) with trigger-specific copy. Mobile responsive at 375px. Cookie consent positioned correctly.

issues: Some story cards use gradient fallback instead of thumbnails (expected behavior for stories without thumbnails)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 511 completed full UAT. All 20 flows verified. Backend APIs working correctly. Frontend components rendering properly. Key findings: (1) LiveBattleHero shows battle data with stats, countdown timer, psychology copy. (2) QuickActions has 3 cards. (3) BattlePaywallModal shows 3 packs (₹29/₹49/₹149) with correct pricing and trigger-specific copy. (4) Story Battle Page has 6/7 components (video player not shown when no video available). (5) Explore page shows 64 stories with category filters. (6) Pricing page shows 4 subscription plans and 4 top-up packs. (7) Profile page has 5 tabs. (8) About page shows founder photo correctly. (9) Cookie consent at bottom-right, does not overlap bottom nav on mobile. (10) Mobile responsive at 375px.

verified_flows.FLOW_6_Enter_Battle: PASS - Triggers paywall modal when credits low

verified_flows.FLOW_8_Story_Viewer: PASS - Loads story data, shows BattlePulse, Enter Battle CTA
verified_flows.FLOW_9_Explore: PASS - 64 stories with thumbnails, category filters, Create Story button

verified_flows.FLOW_16_Navigation: PASS - Back buttons work, sidebar links work
